Create gallery-quality A3+ photographs and fine art with 8-ink printing using HP Vivera InksCreate gallery-quality A3+ photos and fine art with 8-ink printing using HP Vivera Inks. Brilliant, wide-gamut inks for life-like portraits, colour landscapes and black-and-white photos with neutral grey tones and deep blacks.
Exceptional durability – photos resist fading for more than 200 years*.HP Vivera Pigment Inks are formulated for industry-leading image quality with top fade resistance and durability. Photos resist fading for more than 200 years when printed on HP Advanced Photo Paper*.
Prints are ready to handle and fully waterproof* with instant-drying HP Advanced Photo PaperPrints are ready to handle and water-, smudge- and humidity-resistant on many fine art and photo papers. Print on HP Advanced Photo Paper and photos are fully waterproof* – you could even hold them under a running tap.
HP ProPrint plug-in for Adobe Photoshop plus other advanced colour management toolsGet consistent, accurate colour with HP densitometric closed loop colour calibration, HP Colour Centre tool, Adobe Photoshop plug-in plus optional HP raster image processor (RIP).
Print on your choice of photo & art media up to 1.5 mm thick including satin-matt, canvas & moreStraight paper path and automatic paper thickness adjustments for media up to 1.5 mm thick. Print on HP satin-matt, matte and glossy photo papers, or HP canvas media, photo rag, watercolour papers, pre-matted papers, film, etc.
Print up to A3+ in less than 1.5 minutes and 10 x 15 cm photos in as fast as 10 secondsSave time with HP's fast, professional printing technology. Print an A3+ photo in as fast as 1.5 minutes in Draft mode – perfect for proofing ahead of final printing. Also print a 10 x 15 cm photo in as fast as 10 seconds.
High-capacity individual pigment ink cartridges for high-volume printing efficiencyHigh-capacity ink cartridges designed for efficient ink usage to save time, ink and money. Electrostatic drop detection printhead management system minimises cleaning cycles and keeps printer in top working condition.

Prints are ready to handle and water-, smudge- and humidity-resistant on many fine art and photo papers. Print on HP Advanced Photo Paper and photos are fully waterproof* – you could even hold them under a running tap.
Control colours by calibrating your display with included HP Colorimeter powered by GretagMacbeth technology. Choose sRGB or Adobe RGB colour spaces in the driver or manage colours from the application.
Get consistent, accurate colour with HP densitometric closed loop colour calibration, HP Colour Centre tool, Adobe Photoshop plug-in plus optional HP raster image processor (RIP).
Straight paper path and automatic paper thickness adjustments for media up to 1.5 mm thick. Print on HP satin-matt, matte and glossy photo papers, or HP canvas media, photo rag, watercolour papers, pre-matted papers, film, etc.
Save time with HP's fast, professional printing technology. Print an A3+ photo in as fast as 1.5 minutes in Draft mode – perfect for proofing ahead of final printing. Also print a 10 x 15 cm photo in as fast as 10 seconds.
HP Vivera Pigment Inks are formulated for industry-leading image quality with top fade resistance and durability. Photos resist fading for more than 200 years when printed on HP Advanced Photo Paper*.
